description: We specialize in the production and sales of outdoor shoes and sports shoes. The brands are (A:B, AX BOXING, Arrigo Bello). We sell more than 500,000 pairs of snow boots every year in winter European physical stores. We are a brand that values customer experience and has many loyal customers. --Upper: PU leather has the advantages of wear resistance, cold resistance,breathability, aging resistance and beautiful appearance. --Sole: Made of high-quality rubber material, wear-resistant, non-slip (the bottom has a deeper texture, it is not easy to slip), sturdy, protect your feet, high elasticity, safe and comfortable --Intrinsic material: Fully fur-lined snow boots keep your feet warm in cold weather. --Applicable scene: These boots are suitable for most scenes, such as leisure, office, snow, walking, horseback riding, party, hiking, etc. We make every pair of shoes to make you have a warm and comfortable winter. If there is any problem during the use, please contact us by email, we will provide you with quality service and let you have a better experience.
